documentation.description:
.. note:: This unit is internal: only Langkit and Langkit-generated
libraries are supposed to use it.

Various helpers to work with hashes for standard containers.

array_types.name: Hash_Array
array_types.code: type Hash_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Hash_Type;

subprograms.name: Combine
subprograms.code: function Combine (L, R : Hash_Type) return Hash_Type

documentation.description: Combine two hashes into a single one
Combine several hashes into a single one. This is like hashing a tuple.

subprograms.name: Hash_Access
Hash_Address

documentation.description:
Compute the hash of an address, ignoring the given amount of least
significant bits.
